conditions.rightValue: ROUNDTABLE INVITE - FEB 19 - REAL ESTATE - 500k+ REV

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert email reply classifier specializing in roundtable event invitations.

Analyze the email reply and return ONLY this exact format, nothing else:

classification: [Positive/False Positive/Negative]
actual_reply: [extracted reply text]
reasoning: [one sentence]
red_flags: [concerns or None]

CLASSIFICATION RULES:
- Positive: Genuine interest, confirmed attendance, or asking for more details before committing
- False Positive: Seems positive but sarcastic, contradictory, or confused about their role (e.g. asking about speaking fees, "sure but I won't show up")
- Negative: Clear rejection, unsubscribe request, or out-of-office with no actual reply

EXTRACTING ACTUAL REPLY — strip out everything below, keep only the prospect's words:
- Email signatures (name, title, phone, address, company)
- Quoted thread (everything after "-----Original Message-----" or "On [date]... wrote:")
- Lines starting with ">"
- Unsubscribe links
- "Sent from my iPhone/Outlook" footers

reply.html_body:
Deborah, 
Thanks for reaching out. I think that Cherif and Sean were going to specifically discuss Sean's programs for consulting on marketing for those we set up on the structure side.
Is that a call you would like me to book on Sean's calendar?
Also- Sean said that you were sending a list of the linkedin handles for those who participated on the call? When will that be sent over, I think Sean said it would be shared Friday but I didn't see it.
Let me know.
Thanks
Ashlee


On Mon, Feb 23, 2026 at 8:09 AM Deborah West <deborahwest@catalystsparkcollab.com> wrote:
Hi Ashlee,

We appreciate Cherif joining the Roundtable last Feb 19.

Sean and Joren are opening a limited number of follow-up slots this week for attendees who want to continue the conversation directly.

It’s a focused 20-minute session.
I have some slots open for Tuesday or Wednesday — which works better for you?

Alternatively, you can also check for open slots here in our calendar links:

Sean’s Calendar
Joren’s Calendar

Best regards,
Deborah West
Scale Virtually
On Tue, Feb 3, 2026 5:31:24 PM Ashlee Jones <ashlee@cmrei.com> wrote:
Yes, I received it. Cherif will see you all on the 19th at 10AM PST. 
If you need him to review anything in advance send it over. 
Thanks
Ashlee
844-720-1031

On Tue, Feb 3, 2026 at 12:28 PM Deborah West <deborahwest@catalystsparkcollab.com> wrote:
Calendar invite sent Ashlee, let me know if you got it on your end.

Best regards,
Deborah West
Scale Virtually

On Tue, Feb 3, 2026 3:21:22 PM Ashlee Jones <ashlee@cmrei.com> wrote:
Very good. I handle all his scheduling, you can send the link to confirm his participation to ashlee@cmrei.com.
Thanks

On Tue, Feb 3, 2026 at 12:12 PM Deborah West <deborahwest@catalystsparkcollab.com> wrote:
Hi Ashlee,

Happy to know that Cherif can join us on this one. This roundtable consist of a small group of CEO, founders and partners from the Real Estate Industry. We are keeping the audience small to ensure Sean can really connect with each attendee. Happy to send the calendar invitation here or on Cherif's email directly if you can provide it.

Best regards,
Deborah West
Scale Virtually
On Mon, Feb 2, 2026 1:08:22 PM Ashlee Jones <ashlee@cmrei.com> wrote:
Cherif can definitely join in on this conversation.
His background was with Hilton Hotels in upper regional management and then he went to work for a Billionaire in the same capacity, plus managing millions in assets and negotiating. 35 years ago he started his own portfolio and manages his own teams from PR to CA.
Please send me the link for him to attend and anything you may need from us.
Who will listen in on this round table and what is the end goal?
Thanks
Ashlee
844-720-1031

On Mon, Feb 2, 2026 at 9:49 AM Deborah West <deborahwest@catalystsparkcollab.com> wrote:
Cherif, 

Would love to have you join us for the roundtable.

Here are the quick details:
Roundtable Theme: "Preparing for a Strong Exit"
Date & Time: Tuesday, February 19th at 12PM CST / 10AM PST
Location: Zoom link sent upon RSVP

Roundtable Facilitator: Sean Connolly is an accomplished entrepreneur, visionary innovator, and sought-after speaker who has been honored by the Inc. 500 for his exceptional business achievements.

Also here is a digital invitation with more info.

Will that date and time work for you?


On Sun, Feb 1, 2026 2:35:10 PM Ashlee Jones <ashlee@cmrei.com> wrote:
We would love to participate.
Please send info.
Thanks
Ashlee

On Sun, Feb 1, 2026 at 8:27 AM Deborah West <deborahwest@catalystsparkcollab.com> wrote:
Hi Cherif,

Hoping to invite you to a CEO roundtable on “Building Operational Processes for a Strong Eventual Exit.”

On Feb 19, 2026 at 12:00 PM CST, Inc. 500 entrepreneur Sean Connolly will facilitate a virtual conversation with a select group of real estate CEOs/founders doing ~1M–2M in revenue. He’ll discuss strategies for transitioning away from being the “Chief Everything Officer,” installing documented operating procedures buyers expect, leveraging world-class virtual assistants, and increasing enterprise value ahead of an eventual exit.

We’ve been following what you’re building at CREPR, and I thought this might be especially relevant as you think about building long-term value heading into Q2.

We have a few spots left. Can I share more info?


Best regards,
Deborah West
Scale Virtually
